name: Skio Subscription Commerce API
what_it_does: Skio REST API for Shopify-native subscription commerce platform. Enables AI agents to manage subscriber account and subscription plan data retrieval, handle subscription lifecycle management including creation, modification, and cancellation, access subscription billing cycle and payment schedule management, retrieve subscriber health data for churn prediction and retention, manage subscription bundle and product swap workflows, handle password-less subscriber portal authentication management, access subscription analytics and revenue metrics, retrieve dunning and failed payment recovery workflow data, manage discount and offer configuration for subscriber acquisition and retention, and integrate subscription data with Shopify ecosystem, Klaviyo, and analytics platforms.
use_cases: Managing subscription lifecycle from Shopify automation agents
Recovering failed subscription payments from retention agents
Analyzing subscriber churn risk from revenue operations agents
Personalizing subscription offers from marketing automation agents
not_for: Non-Shopify e-commerce platforms without Shopify checkout integration
B2B software subscriptions without consumer physical product e-commerce focus
Enterprise subscription management outside Shopify ecosystem
best_when: A Shopify brand using Skio wants AI agents to automate subscriber management, churn prevention, failed payment recovery, retention workflows, and Shopify + Klaviyo ecosystem integration.
avoid_when: SHOPIFY DEPENDENCY: Skio is tightly coupled to Shopify; non-Shopify platforms are not supported. Automated subscription changes must respect Shopify checkout flow; direct API modifications may bypass Shopify's payment processing. Subscriber communication should accompany automated changes to prevent negative brand perception.

auth.notes: Skio uses API key authentication. Per-merchant API credentials. GraphQL and REST API available. Documentation at docs.skio.com. Webhooks for subscription events. Shopify-native built on Shopify checkout and payments. Password-less subscriber portal (no subscriber login friction). Klaviyo native integration. Developer-friendly GraphQL API.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — percentage of subscription revenue plus monthly fee
pricing.paid_tiers: Starter ($599/mo), Pro ($1,500/mo); percentage of subscription revenue
pricing.notes: New York City, New York. Founded 2020. Private ($25M funding). Shopify subscription commerce market. Developer-first approach with GraphQL API. Known for password-less subscriber portal reducing subscriber friction. Strong in Shopify DTC brands. Growing quickly in post-Recharge migration market. Competes with Recharge and Ordergroove for Shopify subscription commerce.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; GraphQL complexity limits apply

known_agent_gotchas: SHOPIFY DEPENDENCY: Skio is Shopify-native; all subscription operations flow through Shopify checkout and Shopify Payments; non-Shopify operations not supported
GraphQL preferred — Skio's GraphQL API provides more flexibility than REST for subscription data retrieval; use GraphQL for complex subscriber queries
Password-less portal — Skio's password-less portal uses tokenized links; subscriber portal access automation requires token generation via API
Webhook for events — use webhooks for subscription lifecycle events; polling subscriber list is inefficient for high-volume stores
Klaviyo integration — native Klaviyo integration triggers email flows; understand Klaviyo event mapping before building custom notification automation
Young company — Skio founded 2020; API surface evolving rapidly; monitor changelog for breaking changes more frequently than established vendors
agent_readiness.security_notes: Shopify subscription commerce. PCI-DSS L1, GDPR, CCPA. API key. US. Subscriber and recurring payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Shopify subscriptions. PCI-DSS L1, GDPR, CCPA. API key. US. Subscriber and payment data.
